titleStmt.title: SII 24.29: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 29. (A.R. No. 110 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Partly built in. Records an assignment by sale of fallow land for payment of 10 kalam of paddy to the temple by the temple executives towards the expenses of two festivals to be conducted every year in the temple. The details of the recipients of the land are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷa vun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai rākarattu vāri Ayirmuṉaik kontaḷavaracar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porpala naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai
n karun=talai parun=talaittiṭa tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaikkiṭappa Innāḷ piṟ kula piṟai pol niṟpiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai vil letir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki vena tuṅkapattirai yaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina vīramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟu ṭain ta kaṭalkaḷun talai ticai tannāḷu
vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñceṉai Evip pañcava markaḷattañci veruneḷit toṭi ṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭip paṭuttu maṟṟavar carar tiriyum poccai veñcura meṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticai toru niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭpotiyil matta veṅkari paṭumeyyayiccaiyyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kā
pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattu Āḻvār kanmikaḷil ci tiru veṅkaṭappiccarum kāttikan tiruveṅkaṭa tāsarum Oṭṭakkuṭi tiruvaṭivaḷanampiyum ru mārukā vūr tiruvaraṅka nampiyum ci caṭakopa nampiyum cipaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum pāratāyan cirāmanum taniiḷañciṅkamum pāratāyan kecuvan Āritan
mmāva maṅkalattu ve ṭaittu maṇaliṭāyum payir ceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭanta nilam Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ n toṟṟuppuṟam Amutu ceytaruḷavum Iraṇṭu tiru nāḷum tirtta tirunāḷ paṭipaṭiyāṭṭi Amutu ceyvikkavum cantirātittavarai nivan=tamāka Ivarkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nancaikku kīḻpāṟke
Onṟu- 1 kācu Onṟu- 1(1/2) Onṟekālukku nila vilaik koṭukkina kācu O vār cipaṇṭāratti(ti)le Oṭukkitta kaṭavarākavum Innilam Onṟekālum tiruttaṟa tirutti paṇṭārattil paḷḷi koṇṭān marakkālāl puncey varicaippaṭi veli Onṟukku ḷa Eṇkalamāka van=taṭai ḷa patin kalamum Aḷantu ponnil mikuti celuttakkaṭavārākavum maiveṭa
ceytuvarak kaṭavarākavum kku koyil kalveṭṭi kalam pattum paṟṟukkuṭuttom Āḻ vār kanmmikaḷom ya neḻuttu Ip paṭikku Ivai koyil kaṇakku nānūṟṟu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ārāvamutu neḻuttu Ippaṭikku
neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruveṅkaṭappiccu Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅka kona ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cirāman Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ittanmam cantirātittaval celuttuvikkakaṭavomānom tiruvaraṅkattu sabhaiyom Itu śrīvayiṣṇava rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
